languages.text: "От дворянского наследования власти к диктатуре лучшего убийцы?"
"From noble succession to dictatorship by the best killer?"
languages.original_text: "От дворянского наследования власти к диктатуре лучшего убийцы?"

traits.locale_text: "From noble succession to a dictatorship of the best killer?"
"From noble succession to dictatorship by the best killer?"
"From feudalism to a dictatorship of the best killer?"
"From noble succession to a dictatorship of the best killer?"
"From noble succession to dictatorship by the best killer?"
"From noble succession to dictatorship by the best killer?"

languages.text: 「封建制から、最強の殺し屋の独裁へ？」
languages.original_text: "From feudalism to a dictatorship of the best killer?"

traits.locale_text: 封建制から、最強の殺し屋の独裁へ？

languages.text: « D'une autocratie héréditaire à la dictature du meilleur tueur ? »
languages.original_text: "From noble succession to dictatorship by the best killer?"

traits.locale_text: « D'une autocratie héréditaire à la dictature du meilleur tueur ? »

languages.text: "Soylu verasetinden en iyi katilin diktatörlüğüne mi geçildi yani?"
languages.original_text: "From noble succession to dictatorship by the best killer?"

traits.locale_text: "Soylu verasetinden en iyi katilin diktatörlüğüne mi geçildi yani?"

languages.text: «¿Pasaron de una nobleza hereditaria a la dictadura del mejor asesino?».
languages.original_text: "From noble succession to dictatorship by the best killer?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Pasaron de una nobleza hereditaria a la dictadura del mejor asesino?».

languages.text: “从贵族世袭，变成了最强杀手的独裁统治？”
languages.original_text: "From noble succession to dictatorship by the best killer?"

traits.locale_text: “从贵族世袭，变成了最强杀手的独裁统治？”

languages.text: "Von adeliger Erbfolge zur Diktatur des besten Killers?"
